name: Hot and Spicy Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. Shrimp should be of a size to number 30-35 per pound.
2. Melt the butter and oil in a flameproof baking dish.
3. Add the garlic, herbs, peppers, bay leaves, paprika, and lemon juice. Bring to a boil.
4. Turn down the heat and simmer for 10 minutes, stirring frequently.
5. Remove the dish from the heat and let the flavors marry for at least 30 minutes. The hot butter sauce can be made up to one day in advance and refrigerated.
6. Preheat the oven to 450°F.
7. Reheat the sauce, add the shrimp, and cook over medium heat until the shrimp just turn pink.
8. Bake in the oven for about 30 minutes more.
9. Taste for seasoning, adding salt if necessary.
